title: dicranostyles costanensis
intro: Dicranostyles costanensis is a flowering plant species in the family Convolvulaceae, commonly known as the morning glory family, native to South America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues, due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, alleviating menstrual cramps, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Dicranostyles costanensis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
